top_signals.title: Bitcoin bear market ‘dead’ after first TD9 reversal signal since July 2022 fires
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin bear-market bottom signs appear as the TD9 indicator mirrors the final stages of the 2022 BTC price downtrend.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Mr John Wrottesley Appointed as New General Manager of International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC)
top_signals.summary: The International Cable Protection Committee (ICPC) announces the official appointment of Mr John Wrottesley as the new General Manager of the global organisation to take over from Mr Ryan Wopschall who is stepping down after six years in the position. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260701036941/en/ Wrottesley first joined the [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Automakers report mixed U.S. sales results as hybrid vehicles drive market
top_signals.summary: Second-quarter U.S. new vehicle sales show a sharp divide, with automakers offering hybrid models largely outperforming those without  them.

top_signals.title: ‘We desperately need legislation that includes an agreement on ethics:’ Trump financial filing adds urgency to crypto bill negotiations
top_signals.summary: Trump's financial disclosure, revealing millions in crypto-related income, is adding urgency to write ethics restrictions into a crypto bill.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
